description: Use this API to delete Time Series Power Flow profile data by curvesetid and curvecol and index. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = purge_tspf_profiledata(curvesetid,curvecol, index)

parameters.name: curvesetid
parameters.description: Profile curve number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: curvecol
parameters.description: Profile curve collumn. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Time point index. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: Time point of the curve not found.
Prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
